producthunt.name: Migma AI
producthunt.tagline: AI runs your email marketing. Better with every send.
producthunt.description: Migma creates full campaigns before you ask. It understands your goals and events, creates every email, personalizes and localizes it, and renders consistently across inboxes. It handles sending, preferences and compliance, then learns what drives revenue.

producthunt.name: CartAI
producthunt.tagline: The AI agent that handles checkout.
producthunt.description: Checkout is the hard part, and most solutions clear it only where the merchant has integrated. CartAI completes checkout on any live merchant surface with no merchant-side work, cooperating with bot detection instead of evading it. One developer-first API, four products: Catalog (search and live pricing across merchants), Checkouts (clear and track orders to confirmation), Payments (PCI off your stack via Visa and Mastercard agent rails), Monetization (commissions on every agent sale).

producthunt.name: Replay QA
producthunt.tagline: Replay QA tells you what is broken before your users do
producthunt.description: Add your GitHub repo for continuous testing, or drop in a URL for a one-time check. Replay QA explores your app, records every session, finds real bugs, and gives your coding agent the root cause and fix. Try for free: qa.replay.io
